detected_by: founder-pasted audit from a second session operating in ~/Projects/sina-governance-ssot (reported RUNTIME_NOT_SCAFFOLDED)
finding: Two clones of sina-governance-SSOT exist: (A) ~/Desktop/Noetfield-Systems/sina-governance-SSOT (Cowork session working tree, branch cursor/language-layer-v1) and (B) ~/Projects/sina-governance-ssot (Cursor agent lane per AGENTS.md). The entire P0-PGR runtime (Phase 0-2, 63 files) existed only as untracked files in clone A. Clone B's audit was correct for clone B: nothing in any branch or history, because nothing was ever committed.
root_cause: Session file tools write to the working tree but never commit; L6 (receipts live in the repo) was satisfied only in the working-tree sense, not the git sense. Both prior audits flagged 'receipts untracked - no tamper evidence' — this incident is that flag materializing.

resolution.commit: 7bd58d5 on cursor/language-layer-v1 (feat(p0pgr): P0 Dispatch Brain Runtime v1.1 — Phase 0-2 complete scope, 63 files)
resolution.push_status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON: sandbox has no GitHub credentials — founder or Mac-side session must run 'git push origin cursor/language-layer-v1' from clone A
resolution.clone_b_sync: after push: git fetch && git checkout cursor/language-layer-v1 (or cherry-pick 7bd58d5) in ~/Projects/sina-governance-ssot

new_law_candidate: Every P0-PGR session that writes runtime files ends with a scoped git commit on the working branch (never merge — merge stays founder-gated). Uncommitted receipts are invisible receipts.
authority_note: Which clone is canonical (Desktop vs Projects) is a founder decision; AGENTS.md currently names ~/Projects as the SG lane repo.
next_pointer: founder: push branch; decide canonical clone; optionally add commit step to p0pgr-operator skill checklist (done in skill v2.1)
